State rotations between rounds

Conclusion
- Across the start, middle, and end of the compression, all small operations (ROTR/xor for S0/S1, ch, maj) and all additions (step1/2/3, temp1/temp2, new a/e) match exactly, and the register shifts are correct.

VERDICT: GENUINE
